title: Similarity Search Tool Execution
interaction_flow: AnonymousAgent → SimilaritySearch: invoke tool with Tool::handle(Request $request)
EloquentBuilder (whereVectorSimilarTo) → Stringable::toEmbeddings(): convert queryString to embedding vector
PendingEmbeddingsGeneration → EmbeddingProvider: generate() → provider->embeddings(inputs, dimensions, model, timeout)
EloquentBuilder → EloquentBuilder: apply optional $query closure, apply limit
SimilaritySearch::handle → Collection: normalize result to Collection
SimilaritySearch::handle: check $results->isEmpty() → return 'No relevant results found.' if empty
PendingReranking → PendingReranking::rerank($query, $provider, $model): resolve provider from config
PendingReranking → RerankingProvider: provider->rerank(documents, query, limit, model)
RerankingProvider (Reranks trait) → EventDispatcher: dispatch Reranking event
RerankingProvider → RerankingGateway: rerankingGateway()->rerank(provider, model, documents, query, limit)
Collection::rerank → Collection: map results by index → reordered Collection
SimilaritySearch::handle → AnonymousAgent: return JSON string with ranked results

key_methods.SimilaritySearch::handle(Request $reques: Main entry point. Calls $using closure, normalizes result, optionally reranks, returns JSON string.
key_methods.SimilaritySearch::usingModel(string $mod: Static factory building an Eloquent-based $using closure with vector similarity query.
key_methods.Collection::rerank (macro)(Closure|array: Registered in AiServiceProvider. Extracts text fields, calls Reranking::of()->limit()->rerank(), remaps by index.
key_methods.PendingEmbeddingsGeneration::generate(?p: Resolves provider, optionally uses cache, calls provider->embeddings().
key_methods.PendingReranking::rerank(string $query,: Resolves provider from config, iterates with failover, calls provider->rerank().

key_relationships: SimilaritySearch implements Tool (interface: description(), handle(Request), schema(JsonSchema))
AnonymousAgent implements Agent, Conversational, HasTools — holds tools iterable including SimilaritySearch
SimilaritySearch depends_on Closure (injected via constructor or usingModel factory)
SimilaritySearch depends_on Collection::rerank macro (registered by AiServiceProvider)
whereVectorSimilarTo Eloquent scope depends_on Stringable::toEmbeddings macro → Embeddings::for() → PendingEmbeddingsGeneration → EmbeddingProvider
branching_logic: IF $results instanceof array → wrap in Collection; IF Collection → use as-is; ELSE → call ->get() on query builder
IF $results->isEmpty() → return 'No relevant results found.' (early exit)
IF reranking provider throws FailoverableException → dispatch ProviderFailedOver event, try next provider

return_values.with_results: 'Relevant results found. They are listed below in order of relevance:\n\n' + JSON (pretty-printed)

important_notes: SimilaritySearch is a Laravel AI package Tool (namespace Laravel\Ai\Tools). The $using Closure is the vector DB adapter — usingModel() provides a built-in Eloquent adapter using whereVectorSimilarTo scope which internally converts query string to embeddings via Stringable::toEmbeddings macro. Reranking is optional; providers (Cohere, VoyageAI, Jina) are configured via config('ai.default_for_reranking'). AnonymousAgent is the runtime container holding tool instances. Both embedding and reranking support provider failover.
